filesModified.purpose: Added darkMode boolean attribute with default true
Added dark mode toggle to BlockControls toolbar and made dark mode classes conditional using cn()
Made dark mode classes conditional using class_name() and added data-dark-mode attribute
Added light mode support for dropdown arrows, blog dividers, Load More button, and fixed btn-tertiary hover contrast in both modes
Added dark-mode-aware classes (dark:bg-charcoal bg-white, dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10)
Added dark-mode-aware classes (dark:bg-charcoal bg-white, dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10)
Added dark mode overrides for pagination (.dark .navigation) with white text and inverted colors

attributesAdded.name: darkMode
attributesAdded.description: Toggle dark mode on/off. When true, displays charcoal pseudo-element background with white text. When false, displays on page's off-white background with charcoal text.

syncStatus.details: TSX and PHP structures kept in sync. Conditional classes match exactly between Archive.tsx and Archive.php using cn() and class_name().

implementationNotes: Added shadow icon toolbar button to toggle dark mode (follows CardsCarousel pattern)
Section className changed from hardcoded 'archive dark bg-transparent! py-gap-8' to conditional using cn()
Inner wrapper div changed from hardcoded dark pseudo-element classes to conditional
Added data-dark-mode attribute to section for JS detection if needed
Card partials (resource, policy) now use dark:bg-charcoal bg-white and dark:border-off-white border-charcoal/10
Blog card unchanged - already uses dark:text-white which is conditional
Team member and testimonial cards unchanged - bg-accent works on both light/dark backgrounds
Fixed btn-tertiary hover contrast bug by adding explicit overrides for both .dark and :not(.dark) contexts
Light mode dropdown arrow uses charcoal stroke instead of white
Light mode blog dividers use rgba(31,31,29,0.2) instead of rgba(255,255,255,0.2)
Light mode Load More button removed (uses default btn-secondary styling)
Pagination in dark mode uses white text with white backgrounds for prev/next buttons
